howItWorks.intro: This baseball era calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: ERA
rules.explanation: Earned runs per nine innings pitched.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Below 3.00 is excellent, 3.00-4.00 is good, above 5.00 is poor.
Earned runs divided by innings pitched, multiplied by 9 (a full game).
